prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for phenol computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF) in gas phase at charge 0, multiplicity 1. The neutral, cation (doublet), and anion (doublet) states were all converged. Most electrophilic site: C3 (carbon, ortho position) with f⁺ = 2.103. Most nucleophilic site: O1 (oxygen, hydroxyl) with f⁻ = 0.162. Dual descriptor (f⁺ − f⁻) is most positive at C3 (ΔΔ = 2.032), indicating strong electrophilic character consistent with electrophilic aromatic substitution reactivity at the ortho and para positions. All charge-conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0, sum f⁻ = 1.0). Partial charges computed via Mulliken scheme in PySCF. A PNG reactivity bar chart was generated. No warnings reported.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.103
